title: Copenhagen Mobility Resilience Atlas
subtitle: A fixed-scenario public-transit atlas for seeing which neighborhoods keep access to campuses, hospitals, and job hubs when time budgets and transfer caps get real
operational_boundary_label: Greater Copenhagen operational boundary, Denmark side only

scenarios.label: Weekday AM Peak
scenarios.description: Tuesday morning commuter peak using a fixed weekday departure time.

scenarios.label: Weekday Midday
scenarios.description: Tuesday off-peak baseline for comparing service spread against rush hour.

scenarios.label: Weekday PM Peak
scenarios.description: Tuesday evening commute window with stronger crowding and transfer pressure.

scenarios.label: Saturday Noon
scenarios.description: Weekend reference slice for non-workday accessibility comparison.
